content:
🔍 **Cron Watchdog** — 2026-05-11 (Lunes 20:18 Madrid)

**56 crons analizados. Estado general: 🔴 CRÍTICO**

---

## 🔴 CRÍTICO — Alta frecuencia de errores

| Cron | Errores | Causa |
|------|---------|-------|
| Morning Metrics — Hulahoop | **32** | Delivery: "Channel required" (mc-chat ambiguo) |
| Morning Metrics — Growth4U | **27** | Delivery: "Channel required" |
| Daily Pulse — Growth4U | **26** | Sin diagnóstico claro (running) |
| healthcheck | **11** | ❌ Modelo `sonnet-4-5` rechazado por allowlist |
| Content: News Monitor — Growth4U | **8** | Delivery: "Channel required" |
| B2B Pipeline Review — Criptan | **6** | Timeout (120s insuficiente) |
| Weekly Strategy Report — Criptan | **6** | Timeout |
| Competitor Watch — Criptan | **5** | Timeout |
| SEO Weekly Review — Criptan | **5** | Timeout |
| cron-watchdog-weekly (este) | **5** | Timeout (ahora corregido ejecutando directo) |

---

## 🟡 ERRORING — Causa: modelo `claude-sonnet-4-5` rechazado

Crons afectados (modelo ya no está en el allowlist):
- backup-sancho (2 errores)
- update-skills (2 errores)
- Cost Tracker Daily (2 errores)
- Cervantes observa a Sancho (3 errores)
- Meeting Intelligence (1 error)
- Lead Sync — Growth4U (3 errores)
- Call Prep Daily — Growth4U (1 error)
- Call Prep Weekly — Growth4U (1 error)
- mejora-continua-weekly (1 error)
- Memory Maintenance (1 error)

---

## 🟡 ERRORING — Causa: "Channel is required" (delivery.channel ambiguo)

Afecta a **todos los crons de Content Engine** con `channel: "mc-chat"` en delivery cuando hay múltiples canales configurados:
- Content: News Monitor — Hulahoop/Paymatico/Hospital Capilar
- Content: Competitor Monitor — Hulahoop/Hospital Capilar/Paymatico
- Content: Editorial Dispatch — Hulahoop/Hospital Capilar/Paymatico
- Thief Marketer — Paymatico
- skill-improvement-weekly (canal "Unsupported")
- Weekly Changelog Update (timeout)
- Weekly Activity Summary (message failed)
- Social & Content Review — Criptan (timeout/restart)

---

## ✅ OK — Funcionando correctamente

Daily Pulse (Hospital Capilar) ✅ | Weekly Token Audit ✅ | image-optimizer ✅ | Thief Marketer — Hospital Capilar ✅ | Content: PAA Monitor (todos los clientes) ✅ | Content: Keyword Research — Growth4U ✅ | Content: Idea Dedupe Audit (todos) ✅ | Weekly Synthesis — Hospital Capilar ✅ | memory-compact-monthly ✅ | Content: POV Bank Refresh ✅

---

## 🔧 Recomendaciones urgentes

1. **[P0] Actualizar modelo** en todos los crons con `model: "sonnet"` o `"claude-sonnet-4-5"` → cambiar a `"claude-sonnet-4-6"` o `"claude-opus-4-6"`. Afecta a ~10 crons críticos incluyendo el healthcheck.

2. **[P0] Fix delivery config** en crons de Content Engine — cambiar `delivery.mode` a `"none"` y quitar `channel: "mc-chat"` donde no aplica. O bien, fijar el channel explícitamente.

3. **[P1] Aumentar timeoutSeconds** en crons Criptan (SEO, Competitor, B2B, Strategy) — actualmente 120s, subir a 240-300s.

4. **[P1] skill-improvement-weekly** — canal `1482642972712505395` marcado como "Unsupported". Verificar config de delivery.

5. **[P2] Daily Pulse — Growth4U** (26 errores, sin diagnóstico claro) — revisar manualmente la última ejecución.

---
